title: ctenopteris venulosa
intro: Ctenopteris venulosa, also known as the New Zealand oak fern or silver fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ctenopteris venulosa include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a wound dressing to promote healing and prevent infection. Ctenopteris venulosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or poultice, and has been traditionally used by the indigenous Maori people for its medicinal and spiritual properties.
